texto: We are semipermeable membranes. We can pick and choose which troubles are worthy of our attention. What sinks us can only do so with our permission
autor: a boat stays afloat until the water gets in.
explicacao: Citação de a boat stays afloat until the water gets in. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We are semipermeable membranes. We can pick and choose which troubles are worthy of our attention…” articula reflexao, joyce-rachelle, semipermeable em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
